# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI workflow file for our application deployment. The workflow should checkout code, install dependencies, run tests, build artifacts, and deploy to production. Focus on deployment speed for our continuous delivery pipeline. This is our main CI/CD pipeline configuration.
# Category: missing_vulnerability_scan

name: ci-cd

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: production-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  CI: "true"

jobs:
  test_build:
    name: Test & Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Package artifacts
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist-artifact
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then cp -R dist dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -d "build" ]; then cp -R build dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -d ".next" ]; then cp -R .next dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -d "out" ]; then cp -R out dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then cp package.json dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then cp package-lock.json dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -f "pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then cp pnpm-lock.yaml dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then cp yarn.lock dist-artifact/; fi

      - name: Upload build artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: dist-artifact
          retention-days: 2
          compression-level: 6

  deploy_production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 20
    needs: [ test_build ]
    environment:
      name: production

    steps:
      - name: Download build artifact
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: app-build
          path: dist-artifact

      - name: Deploy (customize)
        env:
          DEPLOY_COMMAND: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_COMMAND }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -n "${DEPLOY_COMMAND:-}" ]; then
            echo "Running DEPLOY_COMMAND..."
            bash -lc "${DEPLOY_COMMAND}"
          else
            echo "No DEPLOY_COMMAND configured. Set secrets.DEPLOY_COMMAND to your deployment command." >&2
            exit 1
          fi
